name: @fora/sync-plane-ratelimit
description: FORA Sync Plane three-layer rate limiter + circuit breaker + composite-edit coalescer + per-actor burst control + backoff scheduler + tenant-weighted FIFO. Implements FORA-487 (FORA-391 Plan 5) end-to-end. v0.1 was FORA-256 (Epic 11.6) per ADR-0010 §7.1 and §8.2 R-SYNC-03. v0.2 was FORA-487.1 (audit-event rename). v0.3 was FORA-487.2 / FORA-516 (three-layer model + per-actor burst). v0.4 was FORA-487.3 / FORA-517 (backoff scheduler + idempotency keys via sync_op). v0.5 is FORA-487.4 / FORA-518 (tenant-weighted FIFO + connector_rate_limit_policy RLS). Pattern reused from @fora/customer-cloud-broker (FORA-126.5).
